metrics.visualTitle: Sum of Sales Value by Store Name and Category

metrics.QueryText:
DEFINE
	VAR __H0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({("Bolt", "31–60 Days")}, 'Sheet2'[Product Name], 'Sheet2'[Idle Bucket])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('Sheet2'[Date])),
			AND('Sheet2'[Date] >= DATE(2024, 1, 1), 'Sheet2'[Date] < DATE(2024, 12, 31))
		)

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'Sheet2'[Store Name],
			ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL('Sheet2'[Category], "IsGrandTotalColumnTotal"),
			__DS0FilterTable,
			"SumSales_Value", CALCULATE(SUM('Sheet2'[Sales Value])),
			"Sheet2SumSales_Value", IGNORE(
				CALCULATE(SUM('Sheet2'[Sales Value]), KEEPFILTERS(__H0FilterTable))
			)
		)

	VAR __DS0CoreOnlyOutputTotals = 
		SELECTCOLUMNS(
			KEEPFILTERS(FILTER(KEEPFILTERS(__DS0Core), [IsGrandTotalColumnTotal] = FALSE)),
			"'Sheet2'[Store Name]", 'Sheet2'[Store Name],
			"'Sheet2'[Category]", 'Sheet2'[Category],
			"SumSales_Value", [SumSales_Value],
			"Sheet2SumSales_Value", [Sheet2SumSales_Value]
		)

	VAR __DS0CoreTableByDM0 = 
		SELECTCOLUMNS(
			KEEPFILTERS(FILTER(KEEPFILTERS(__DS0Core), [IsGrandTotalColumnTotal] = TRUE)),
			"'Sheet2'[Store Name]", 'Sheet2'[Store Name],
			"SortBy_DM0_0", [SumSales_Value]
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWithSortColumns = 
		NATURALLEFTOUTERJOIN(
			SUMMARIZE(__DS0Core, 'Sheet2'[Store Name]),
			__DS0CoreTableByDM0
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(201, __DS0PrimaryWithSortColumns, [SortBy_DM0_0], 0, 'Sheet2'[Store Name], 1)

	VAR __DS0SecondaryBase = 
		SUMMARIZE(__DS0CoreOnlyOutputTotals, 'Sheet2'[Category])

	VAR __DS0Secondary = 
		TOPN(62, __DS0SecondaryBase, 'Sheet2'[Category], 1)

	VAR __DS0BodyLimited = 
		NATURALLEFTOUTERJOIN(
			__DS0PrimaryWindowed,
			SUBSTITUTEWITHINDEX(
				__DS0CoreOnlyOutputTotals,
				"ColumnIndex",
				__DS0Secondary,
				'Sheet2'[Category],
				ASC
			)
		)

EVALUATE
	__DS0Secondary

ORDER BY
	'Sheet2'[Category]

EVALUATE
	__DS0BodyLimited

ORDER BY
	[SortBy_DM0_0] DESC, 'Sheet2'[Store Name], [ColumnIndex]

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(
			102,
			SUMMARIZE(__DS0Core, 'Sheet2'[Product Name], [IsGrandTotalRowTotal]),
			[IsGrandTotalRowTotal],
			0,
			'Sheet2'[Product Name],
			1
		)

	VAR __DS0SecondaryBase = 
		SUMMARIZE(__DS0Core, 'Sheet2'[Store Name], [IsGrandTotalColumnTotal])

	VAR __DS0Secondary = 
		TOPN(102, __DS0SecondaryBase, [IsGrandTotalColumnTotal], 1, 'Sheet2'[Store Name], 1)

	VAR __DS0BodyLimited = 
		NATURALLEFTOUTERJOIN(
			__DS0PrimaryWindowed,
			SUBSTITUTEWITHINDEX(
				__DS0Core,
				"ColumnIndex",
				__DS0Secondary,
				[IsGrandTotalColumnTotal],
				ASC,
				'Sheet2'[Store Name],
				ASC
			)
		)

EVALUATE
	__DS0Secondary

ORDER BY
	[IsGrandTotalColumnTotal], 'Sheet2'[Store Name]

EVALUATE
	__DS0BodyLimited

ORDER BY
	[IsGrandTotalRowTotal] DESC, 'Sheet2'[Product Name], [ColumnIndex]
